body_html_quoted.html:
+$1,000 worth of exclusive perks await!
🎁

Get a FREE Dessert Table – The Sweet Ending Your Event Deserves 🍰

🤫

So there's one thing you gotta know about our tastings – they're not just about the food.

🍽️

Not only are you going to sample 30+ of our most popular catering dishes, but we also give away almost $1,000 worth of exclusive incentives and deals at our tastings.

Crown Jewel
👑

And the crown jewel of these perks? A dessert table, absolutely free.

✨

Your dessert table doesn't just satisfy sweet cravings – it creates that magical moment when guests realize your event has been thoughtfully planned down to the last delicious detail.

💝

Most caterers charge hundreds for dessert service, but when you book a tasting, it's our gift to you.

🌟

This is what sets our tastings apart – you don't just taste the food, you discover the incredible value we bring to every celebration.

🎊

Ready to see what other exclusive perks await you at your tasting experience?

Take Action

Ask your Catering Consultant about booking a tasting today

Contact Us Today

On Aug 25, 2025, at 07:37 PM, Comeketo Catering Team <comeketo@m.comeketocatering.com> wrote:

Discover these two legendary services.

The Authentic Brazilian Experience Your Guests Will Never Forget 🔥

Welcome to the heart of Brazilian hospitality: Churrasco and Rodizio services that transform ordinary events into extraordinary celebrations.

What is Churrasco?

Churrasco is where the magic begins – our legendary live grilling service that brings the authentic Brazilian barbecue experience directly to your event.

Watch as our skilled chefs masterfully grill premium cuts of meat right before your guests' eyes.

Fresh, perfectly cooked meats flow continuously from grill to buffet, ensuring every bite is served at the peak of flavor and temperature.

But it's more than just cooking – it's an immersive sensory journey.

The intoxicating aroma of traditional Brazilian spices fills your venue, creating an atmosphere that transports guests straight to the vibrant streets of Rio.

What is Rodizio?

If Churrasco is the foundation, Rodizio is the crown jewel – the service that has made Comeketo legendary in the catering world.

Rodizio amplifies every element of our Churrasco service and elevates it to an art form.

Picture our Gauchos gracefully moving through your event carrying impressive skewers of perfectly grilled meats.

They approach each table with the skill of master carvers, slicing fresh portions directly onto your guests' plates.

Each guest receives personal attention, with meats carved to their exact preference and doneness.

This isn't just dinner service – it's an interactive experience that becomes the centerpiece of your celebration.

The Complete Brazilian Journey

When you choose our Churrasco and Rodizio services, you're not just hiring caterers – you're bringing authentic Brazilian culture to your event.

Comeketo Catering

199 Main Street
Fitchburg, MA

This is an unmonitored inbox, for help, questions, or more details, please contact your catering consultant

Regards,
Andre Raw

On Aug 25, 2025, at 07:37 PM, Comeketo Catering Team <comeketo@m.comeketocatering.com> wrote:
Discover these two legendary services.

The Authentic Brazilian Experience Your Guests Will Never Forget 🔥

Welcome to the heart of Brazilian hospitality: Churrasco and Rodizio services that transform ordinary events into extraordinary celebrations.

What is Churrasco?

Churrasco is where the magic begins – our legendary live grilling service that brings the authentic Brazilian barbecue experience directly to your event.

Watch as our skilled chefs masterfully grill premium cuts of meat right before your guests' eyes.

Fresh, perfectly cooked meats flow continuously from grill to buffet, ensuring every bite is served at the peak of flavor and temperature.

But it's more than just cooking – it's an immersive sensory journey.

The intoxicating aroma of traditional Brazilian spices fills your venue, creating an atmosphere that transports guests straight to the vibrant streets of Rio.

What is Rodizio?

If Churrasco is the foundation, Rodizio is the crown jewel – the service that has made Comeketo legendary in the catering world.

Rodizio amplifies every element of our Churrasco service and elevates it to an art form.

Picture our Gauchos gracefully moving through your event carrying impressive skewers of perfectly grilled meats.

They approach each table with the skill of master carvers, slicing fresh portions directly onto your guests' plates.

Each guest receives personal attention, with meats carved to their exact preference and doneness.

This isn't just dinner service – it's an interactive experience that becomes the centerpiece of your celebration.

The Complete Brazilian Journey

When you choose our Churrasco and Rodizio services, you're not just hiring caterers – you're bringing authentic Brazilian culture to your event.

Comeketo Catering

Fitchburg, MA
